Type"}], "description": "### Impact
The project backup didn't filter Git and Mercurial configuration files and this could lead to remote code execution under certain circumstances.

### Patches
* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/18549

### Workarounds
The project backup is only accessible to users who can create projects. Restricting access to this limits scope of the vulnerability.

### References
This issue was reported by [ggamno](https://hackerone.com/ggamno) via HackerOne.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00708, "percentile": 0.48603}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-558g-h753-6m33", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T20:41:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-558g-h753-6m33", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-558g-h753-6m33"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33435"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-15T19:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T20:41:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-558g-h753-6m33", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33435", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/18549", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/weblate/PYSEC-2026-154.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-558g-h753-6m33"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-558g-h753-6m33", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate: Remote code execution during backup restoration", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:54:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-558g-h753-6m33", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.17", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.17"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate: Remote code execution during backup restoration
